clickhouse_select_query.name: Count all sensor records
clickhouse_select_query.description: Get total count of all sensor data records

clickhouse_select_query.name: Get records by source
clickhouse_select_query.description: Get sensor records from a specific source with limit
clickhouse_select_query.query: SELECT Source, RecordID, Timestamp, Platform FROM dlrl_ew.sensor_data WHERE Source IS NOT NULL LIMIT 100

clickhouse_select_query.name: Get latest records
clickhouse_select_query.description: Get the most recent sensor records sorted by timestamp
clickhouse_select_query.query: SELECT RecordID, Timestamp, Platform, Source, Frequency, Band FROM dlrl_ew.sensor_data ORDER BY Timestamp DESC LIMIT 50

clickhouse_select_query.name: Invalid query - syntax error
clickhouse_select_query.query: SELECT * FROM WHERE invalid syntax here
